name_en: CLARA Plant Material and Calfskin Classic Basket Bag
name_cn:
CLARA Plant Material and Calfskin Classic Basket Bag
Tan
Plant material, calfskin trim
Unlined
Gold finish
Handheld, shoulder, and crossbody
Drawstring leather strap
1 leather handle 4 inches (9 cm) long
1 detachable and adjustable shoulder strap, min length 17 inches (47 cm), max length 20 inches (53 cm)
Style No.: 117862 Tan
Size: 23×25×20 (with original packaging)
